title: Sanji on the Sea Train
description: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Spandam, Sanji, Franky, Kokoro, CP9 agent. Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is my biggest chance yet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: They say the world is vast...

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: They're here on the sea train...

summary: Spandam’s abuse of authority and his control over Robin and Franky make the World Government threat more personal.
